Appropriated and renamed by the [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] [[SCr-114]], the '''''Efficient''''' was a [[Subla Ransom Medium Cargo Hauler]] modified to suit an all-[[Droid/Legends|droid]] crew. [[Escape pod/Legends|Escape pods]], living quarters, [[Life support/Legends|life support]] system, entertainment consoles, and food processors were all stripped away to make place for an all-[[Starship/Legends|ship]] droid maintenance, repair, and upgrading facility.

{{Veh-stub}}
